text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Formulary File Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 2.2 
14 
SEGMENT_ID 
LABEL: 
Market Segment Identifier 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the identifier for the geographic market segment covered by the plan. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
3 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
3-digit number 
COMMENT: 
You need to know both the contract number and plan benefit package identification number 
(variables called CONTRACT_ID and PLAN_ID) in
